series_metadata.series_description: These records are designed to set precedence and define operational guidelines for the agency. Records may include: Policy, standard operating procedures, manuals and any additional record created similarly.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: superseded, obsolete or replaced. Once inactive, five (5) calendar years and historic review has been completed by State Archives. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records. ; Paper: superseded, obsolete or replaced. Once inactive, five (5) calendar years and historic review has been completed by State Archives. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records
